findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "api_status" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check authenticated Cannon Studio account/API connectivity before estimating or creating requests. Requires OAuth or a developer API key; may update key/token u…

description: List first-party Cannon Studio image, video, audio, subtitle, editing, Composer, and 3D toolkit surfaces, including which ones are developer-API operations and which should be opened in the app or routed through Director Mode. Public read-only: no auth, no state changes, no charges.

description.name: get_api_operation
description.description: Return public docs for Cannon Studio developer API operations and payload shapes. Public read-only: no auth, no state changes, no charges; use this before estimate_generation_cost or create_generation_request when operation/input fields are unclear.

description.name: api_status
description.description: Check authenticated Cannon Studio account/API connectivity before estimating or creating requests. Requires OAuth or a developer API key; may update key/token usage metadata, but does not spend credits, enqueue jobs, change assets, or expose secrets.

description.name: estimate_generation_cost
description.description: Estimate credits for a Cannon Studio generation request before creating billable work. Requires OAuth or a developer API key; it may update key/token usage metadata but does not spend credits, enqueue jobs, or change assets. Use get_api_operation first if operation or input fields are unclear, then

description.name: create_generation_request
description.description: Create billable async Cannon Studio generation work only after explicit user approval. Requires OAuth or a developer API key; can spend credits up to max_credits and cannot be cancelled through MCP after submission. Use estimate_generation_cost first, then set confirmed=true and a user-approved max_

description.name: get_generation_request
description.description: Poll and sync an existing Cannon Studio generation request by id. Requires OAuth or a developer API key; not a pure read because it may update lastPolledAt, sync downstream task state, update logs, and deliver one pending terminal webhook. It does not create work, spend credits, cancel jobs, delete

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_offerings, get_checkout_link · Private data: fetch, api_status, estimate_generation_cost, create_generation_request, get_generation_request · Public sink: get_generation_request · Destructive: create_generation_request, get_generation_request.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_offerings, get_checkout_link · Private data: fetch, api_status, estimate_generation_cost, create_generation_request, get_generation_request · Public sink: get_generation_request · Destructive: create_generation_request, get_generation_request

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
